data.title: Harvard-led Study Reveals Bitcoin Mining Spreads Air Pollution Interstate
data.description:
New research shows that crypto mining operations generate harmful pollutants, affecting communities hundreds of miles away.

data.title: Metaplanet becomes Asia’s top corporate bitcoin holder with 108.3% BTC yield in 2025
data.description:
14-4-2025 – Tokyo’s Metaplanet has emerged as Asia’s premier corporate Bitcoin holder, achieving an extraordinary 108. 3% BTC Yield in early 2025. The firm’s holdings have swelled to 4,525 BTC, valued at $386. 3 million, with each coin acquired at an average of $85,366
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/metaplanet-becomes-asias-top-corporate-bitcoin-holder-with-108-3-btc-yield-in-2025/

data.title: JPMorgan Expands Blockchain Payment Service to Include British Pound
data.description: According to PANews, JPMorgan has extended its blockchain-based banking account service, Kinexys Digital Payments, to support the British pound alongside the U.S. dollar and euro. This expansion enables 24/7 corporate payment and foreign exchange services in these currencies. Initial users of the service include LSEG's SwapAgent and commodity trading firm Trafigura. Kinexys has processed over $1.5 trillion in transactions, currently handling approximately $2 billion daily.

data.title: Bitget Q1 report: Total trading volume in the first quarter reached US$2.08 trillion, and spot trading increased by 159% month-on-month
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget recently released a transparency report for the first quarter of 2025. Data shows that the total number of global ecological users of the platform has exceeded 120 million, an increase of nearly 20% from the previous quarter. The total trading volume in the quarter reached 2.08 trillion US dollars, of which the spot trading volume increased by 159% year-on-year to 387 billion US dollars.
In terms of platform activities, Bitget Launchpool launched multiple projects this quarter, including Elixir Network (ELX) and Story Protocol (IP), while RedStone (RED) and Babylon (BABY) were the first to go online for pre-market trading. In addition, Bitget LaunchX launched WalletConnect (WCT) on February 17, distributing 20 million WCT tokens at a fixed price of US$0.2, providing users with the opportunity to participate in the early growth of high-quality projects and obtain tokens. WCT has recently been launched on Binance Launchpool and will be launched on spot trading pairs on April 15.
In terms of asset security, Bitget's Proof-of-Reserves has always remained above 130%. The size of the platform protection fund has increased from US$495 million in January to US$514 million in March.

data.title: RWA Stablecoin Yield Protocol R2 will be officially launched on the test network on April 17
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, R2, a stablecoin income protocol built on TradFi & RWA, announced that its test network will be officially launched at 13:00 on April 17, Beijing time. R2 is committed to integrating Real-World Assets, traditional finance (TradFi) and decentralized finance (DeFi) to create the next generation of stablecoin income solutions.
During the test period, users can receive test tokens through Discord, mint R2USD stablecoins, and participate in interactive gameplay such as staking to obtain simulated income. The official simultaneously launched the Signals + Pulses double points reward mechanism. The accumulated points during the test period can be exchanged for R2 mainnet tokens according to the rules after the mainnet is launched. In addition, R2 will also log in to platforms such as Galxe and Intract to release interactive tasks, and introduce an invitation mechanism to stimulate community growth and give back to early users.
As a pioneer project in the RWAFi track, R2 has reached cooperation with multiple head protocols such as Ondo Finance to actively expand the application of R2USD in DeFi scenarios. It is reported that the R2 mainnet is expected to be officially launched in the second quarter of 2025.

data.title: Here’s how Sam Bank-Fried’s crypto portfolio has performed since imprisonment
data.description:
Since the sentencing of former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried (SBF), the assets linked to his portfolio have shown mixed performance, with Bitcoin (BTC) emerging as the only one to post positive returns. For context, SBF was sentenced to 25 years in prison on March 28, 2024, for orchestrating one of the largest financial frauds in history. In the aftermath, the cryptocurrency market has seen notable shifts in price movement and adoption trends. The portfolio associated with SBF’s companies, including crypto exchange FTX and Alameda Research, mainly comprised assets such as Bitcoin, Ethereum (ETH), Solana (SOL), and FTX’s native token, FTT
source: https://finbold.com/heres-how-sam-bank-frieds-crypto-portfolio-has-performed-since-imprisonment/

data.title: QCP: Long-term sentiment in the crypto market is becoming more positive, and Bitcoin may continue to move sideways in the near term
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News QCP published an article stating that after a week of tariff brinkmanship, risk assets began to stabilize, breaking away from barriers that could have dealt a heavy blow to Sino-US trade. The United States imposed tariffs of up to 145% on Chinese imports, and China hit back with tariffs of 125%. The two sides escalated to the point where the market was no longer surprised by further increases. The huge scale of these tariffs makes them more symbolic than market-driven, which is in stark contrast to the panic caused in the early days of "Liberation Day".
After the close of Friday, the Trump administration quietly exempted smartphones, computers and chips from the latest tariffs. Despite the ongoing stalemate, risk assets are pricing in optimism, even as the United States seems to be negotiating not only with China, but also with the bond market and itself.
In the crypto market, Bitcoin risk reversals still favor put options until June, indicating that the market is still slightly cautious in the short term. However, long-term sentiment is becoming more positive. On Saturday, we observed aggressive buying of 800 lots of BTC-27MAR26-100k-C. Bitcoin continues to consolidate in the $80,000 to $90,000 range and may continue to move sideways, adopting a “wait and see” strategy as the tariff situation develops.

data.title: Trump's Tariffs Pose Challenges to Federal Reserve's Inflation Goals
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump's tariffs have increased consumer prices in the United States, complicating the Federal Reserve's efforts to combat inflation. Economists warn that expectations from businesses and workers about future prices can become self-fulfilling. Ignoring these expectations or dismissing them as temporary is not advisable, as the Federal Reserve's credibility is crucial, reflected in stable long-term inflation expectations.

Boston Federal Reserve President Susan Collins recently highlighted that the impact of tariffs might be more extensive than anticipated. Prior to Trump's tariff announcement, the Federal Reserve had already lowered growth forecasts and raised inflation predictions. Several officials have since warned that inflation could reach 4% this year, providing policymakers with a reason to delay interest rate cuts despite growing concerns about economic slowdown.

Trump's comprehensive tariffs could transform a one-time price shock into sustained inflationary pressure, threatening the Federal Reserve's 2% inflation target. Recent data indicates that long-term inflation expectations have risen to a 30-year high, with consumers anticipating a 6.7% increase in future prices and a 4.4% rise over the next 5-10 years. American households have yet to recover from the post-pandemic price surge, and public trust in the Federal Reserve is being tested.

data.title: Metaplanet buys additional 319 Bitcoin for $26 million
data.description:
Japanese Bitcoin-focused investment firm Metaplanet revealed that it acquired additional 319 Bitcoin for $26 million on April 14.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/metaplanet-buys-additional-319-bitcoin/
